title: rabdochloa rigida
intro: Rabdochloa rigida, also known as the rigid rabdochloa, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Rabdochloa rigida can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
